title: Gold Client
description: [1.21.1] PvP modpack for the best combat experience. Great for Hoplite, MCC Island or Practice Servers.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0fd614f34f404682567642723410da98681eaa3.png)
# ABOUT
Gold Client is a simple PvP modpack providing the best combat experience. Great for Hoplite, MCC Island, Practice Servers or Crystal PVP. Can be played standalone, or used as a base for your modpacks. Modpack works flawlessly on both modern and classic PVP servers, allowing you to play 1.8 with all animations, sword blocking and block-hitting.
* **NOW FULLY SUPPORTING MODERN PVP ON MINEMEN CLUB**

![BH](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/ca28c1bd-8c0e-4625-bda1-43965a48650c.webp)
# FEATURES
* Many Optimization Mods
* Fixed Bugs in Vanilla
* Client Tweaks and Improvements
* Nickname Additions (Tier Tagger, Ping Display)
* GUI and HUD Elements (Coordinates Display, Armor HUD, Potion HUD)
* Voice Chat Support (For Hoplite)
* Full support for 1.8 PVP
* FREE WORLD SHARING
* Discord Rich Presence

# MY MODPACKS
* [Rising Legends](https://modrinth.com/modpack/rl-craft) [1.20.1] RLCraft Recreated For Modern Minecraft Versions.
* [Dragon Realm [FABRIC]](https://modrinth.com/modpack/dragon-realm) [1.20.1] Dragons, dungeons and bosses.
* [Dragon Realm [FORGE]](https://modrinth.com/modpack/dragon-realm-forge) [1.20.1] Dragons, dungeons and bosses.
* [FEAR](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fear) [1.20.1] The Ultimate Horror Modpack.
* [Survival Expansion](https://modrinth.com/modpack/survival-expansion) [1.21.1] Minecraft survival, but better.
* [The Better Vanilla](https://modrinth.com/modpack/better-vanilla-fabric) [1.21.1] Vanilla with improved visuals and performance.
* [Gold Client](https://modrinth.com/modpack/pvp!) [1.21.1] PvP modpack for the best combat experience.
